user.description: Select whether you'd like to configure internal or external scenes.
user.title: Configure Stacked Scenes.

configure_internal_scenes.description: Set the path to the scene file (default works with Home Assistant OS)

select_external_scenes.description:
EXPERIMENTAL!
Select the scenes not in the config file that you'd like to configure. These scenes will need to be learned by Stacked Scenes.

configure_external_scene_entities.description:
Select entities that belong to {scene_name}.
Note: upon submitting the scene will be turned on!

learn_external_scene.description: Confirm whether the scene has been activated.

error.hub_not_found: Main entry not found, configure Stacked Scenes first

scene_invalid_attribute_for_entity.description:
The scene {scene_id} has an invalid attribute {attribute_name} for the entity {entity_id}.

The attribute is not supported by the entity, and will be ignored by Stacked Scenes when calculating the state to be applied.

Please manually remove the attribute from the entity in the scene definition YAML.
scene_invalid_attribute_for_entity.title: Scene {scene_id} has an invalid attribute for the entity {entity_id}
